trade_of_the_day.why_now: Base case (60%): Do-nothing is unambiguously correct — cadence policy prohibits rebalancing today, no kill-switches are breached, and all pre-logged 2026-04-08 actions are tracking positively (KLAC above MA50, LMT above MA50, SLV elimination thesis intact). Expected edge of doing nothing = zero turnover cost vs 20-30bps slippage on any premature trade. Bull case (25%): SPY reclaims MA200=659.38 on 2026-04-08 amid tariff negotiation progress; KLAC and TSM re-accelerate on sentiment relief; 2026-04-08 rebalance executes KLAC 10%→12% increase optimally. Bear case (15%): Tariff escalation deepens; SPY decisively breaks below MA200, entering entrenched bear; Energy demand falls materially; GLD MA200 buffer compresses toward emergency floor. In this scenario, the 2% SLV elimination at 2026-04-08 provides marginal protection but Energy/GLD concentration would require more aggressive defensive action. Today's do-nothing decision preserves 25pp alpha spread vs SPY and costs zero slippage while the 2026-04-08 rebalance window is only 1 day away.
